subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of the Beauty of Abha! O ye firm ones in the Testament of the Covenant of Baha! O ye servants of the Holy Threshold
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران جمال ابهی ای ثابتان بر میثاق طلعت اعلی ای بندگان آستان مقدس حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority, @contention and conflict, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant
